meta.prepared_by: Generated by AI based on provided PRD and code summary

product_overview: An AI-driven personal content automation platform designed specifically for founders, executives, and personal-brand leaders that automates weekly content planning and creation in the user's unique voice across multiple social media platforms, providing a calm, effortless, and premium content experience without the burden of manual planning or analytics.
core_goals: Automate weekly content generation tailored to multiple social media platforms distinctively (e.g., X, LinkedIn, Instagram).
Preserve and amplify the unique personal voice and style of each founder or user in generated content.
Provide a minimal, calm, and intuitive UI that eliminates cognitive load and decision fatigue associated with social media management.
Support multiple Founder Profiles per account to enable scalable management of distinct personal voices within teams or agencies.
Continuously improve content relevance and effectiveness through a hidden AI feedback loop without exposing analytics or requiring user input.
Ensure privacy and data isolation per profile, maintaining the integrity of each personal voice and content.
Offer flexible subscription plans managing profile limits, integrating secure authentication and payment processing.
key_features: Comprehensive onboarding flow allowing platform selection, voice sample input, and minimal setup with optional content preview.
Automated weekly content calendar generation with platform-specific post formats: short text for X, longer posts for LinkedIn, short video scripts for Instagram.
Lightweight post review interface featuring a week view calendar, full post detail cards, multiple hook suggestions, and simple copy-to-clipboard functionality.
Dedicated Ideas Inbox allowing spontaneous idea capture with on-demand AI-generated content suggestions for each platform, without disrupting scheduled content.
Founder Profiles system isolating data, content, and AI voice models per individual with easy profile switching and management.
Automated AI-driven continuous improvement loop analyzing engagement signals quietly to optimize content generation over time.
Secure, scalable backend with Supabase, Next.js frontend with Tailwind CSS, and Stripe for subscription billing integration.
user_flow_summary: User signs up via email/password and completes a frictionless onboarding including platform selection and past writing sample submission for voice training.
System immediately analyses voice samples and prepares a custom writing model, optionally showing a sample generated post for acceptance.
Each week, the platform autonomously generates a separate content calendar per platform and sends a digest email to the user.
User logs in to the Week View dashboard showing scheduled posts by day and platform, clicks any post card to view detailed content with alternative hooks ready for copying or video script use.
User can add spontaneous ideas in the Ideas Inbox at any time, triggering optional AI-generated content suggestions without affecting the core weekly schedule.
Users with multiple profiles switch contexts easily to manage distinct personal brands; account owners manage profiles and subscription plans.
Billing and subscription management flows allow plan upgrades/downgrades, profile addition/removal, and payment method updates.
validation_criteria: Successful onboarding flow completion with profile creation, platform selection, and voice sample acceptance.
Weekly content calendars generated automatically on schedule with platform-specific formatting and multiple hooks.
User can view, copy, and optionally edit posts without errors or UI glitches.
Ideas Inbox accepts input, generates content suggestions per platform, and retains original ideas without corrupting schedules.
Profile switching changes all displayed content and data appropriately with no leakage between profiles.
Subscription plan enforcement correctly limits profiles and features, with proper upgrade/downgrade handling.
System maintains strict data isolation per profile ensuring no cross-contamination of voice models or content.
Email digest for upcoming content is sent reliably and respects user preferences.
System gracefully handles errors in AI content generation, network issues, and payment failures with appropriate UI messages.
UI conforms strictly to the design guidelines: calm colors, white cards, purple accents, subtle animations, and accessiblity standards.

features.name: Onboarding Flow
features.description: Comprehensive onboarding process for users to set up profiles, choose subscription tiers, and configure visual settings.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User authentication flows including Login, Signup, and callback handling via Supabase.

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Main user dashboard for managing content, viewing generation status, and accessing settings.

features.name: API & Services
features.description: Backend API routes for content generation, payment processing, and onboarding completion.
